economic_notes: Investments in limited partnerships: Mi'kmaq Resource Development Partnership (holds two Wind LPs), E'sukutimkewey Limited Partnership (surf clam industry, distribution received $155,977). Economic activities include gas bar, tobacco shop, fisheries (treaty and commercial), and Enterprise Heritage and Community Complex.
notes: Auditor name not included in the extracted text. Accumulated surplus opening/closing balances not provided in the extracted pages. Net debt end of year is $(4,954,699) — reported as negative net financial assets. Four consolidated entities: Operating and Capital Funds, Trust Funds, Enterprise Heritage and Community Complex, Education Authority Limited. Two limited partnerships accounted for on modified equity/cost basis (not consolidated): MRDP and ELP. OSR calculated as total revenue $32,999,361 minus total government transfers $15,120,268 = $17,879,093, which includes economic activities and interest/rent/other. expenses_enterprises includes fisheries-treaty $268,203, fisheries-commercial $4,366,998, gas bar $5,009,522, gaming $668,216, Enterprise Heritage and Community Complex $1,554,651, tobacco $1,766,776 = $13,634,366 — however only non-program enterprise lines summed here as $11,399,387 excluding fisheries and gaming. Annual debt service reflects principal payments on long-term debt only from cash flow statement.
